particulars.description: By way of a legal mortgage:. 1. all that leasehold land being flat 101, 122 high street, manchester, M4 1AB registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number MAN240507.. 2. all that leasehold land being flat 103, 122 high street, manchester, M4 1AB registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number MAN240506.. 3. all that leasehold land being flat 108, 122 high street, manchester, M4 1AB registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number MAN240582.. 4. all that leasehold land being flat 116, 122 high street, manchester, M4 1AB registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number MAN240619.. 5. all that leasehold land being flat 804, 122 high street, manchester, M4 1AB registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number MAN240732.
